---
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---
# Expectations
```{r setup-behsigsoc, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, results = 'markup', warning = TRUE)

library(knitr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)

library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(viridis)
library(ggdist)
library(ggridges)

library(rstan)
library(tidybayes)
library(bayesplot)
library(randtoolbox)

# Source functions
setwd("~/Users/MarienhagenJonathan/rlforaging")
function.list = paste0("social/code/functions/", list.files("social/code/functions"))
function.list = function.list[sapply(function.list, function(x) !grepl("2", x))]
sapply(function.list, source, .GlobalEnv)

```
```{r, directories-behsigsoc, include=FALSE}
if(!dir.exists("social/results")){dir.create("social/results")}
if(!dir.exists("social/results/expectations")){dir.create("social/results/expectations")}
```


## Experimental data structure
```{r, expect-experiment, echo = T, results='markup'}
# Number of simulated experiments
nsim = 5

# Experimental parameters (identical for all simulations)
exp.pars = list(
  sessions = 18,
  trials = 12,
  nplayers = 5, # number of players per session
  durations.vec = c(75, 90, 105)  # The simulation functions sample trial lengths from this vector (equally) 
                                  # and randomly assigns them to the different environments
)
# Add unique ids for players (rows are sessions)
exp.pars$id = with(exp.pars, matrix(1:(sessions*nplayers), ncol=nplayers, byrow = T))

# Environmental parameters (identical for all simulations)
max = round(c(.5, .7, .9), digits = 2)
ratio = round(c(.5, .65, .8, .95), digits = 2)
env.pars = expand.grid(max=max, ratio=ratio)
env.pars = list(max=env.pars$max, ratio=env.pars$ratio)

```

## Models with 1 social learning parameter (dbn, vsn, dbr, vsr)
```{r, expect-1alpha-rlpars, echo=TRUE}
# Get model list
models = getmodels()

# Drop versions with adaptive social learning weights
# models=lapply(models,function(x) x[!grepl(pattern = "2", models$name)] )

# Select models with single social learning parameter (and arl model)
models=lapply(models,function(x) x[models$name %in% c("arl.fixed", "dbn1.fixed", "vsn1.fixed", "dbr1.fixed", "vsr1.fixed")] )

# Load ARL model fit
fit = readRDS("asocial/results/modelcomp/m4.1.fit.rds")

# Get ARL parameter estimates
draws = fit %>%
  tidy_draws() %>%
  select(names(models$free.pars.pop[[which(models$name %in% c("arl.fixed"))]]))
arl.pars = apply(draws, 2, mean)

# Remove fit
remove(fit)

# Set social learning weights for decision- and reward- based DB and VS 
srl.pars = c("alphaDBD", "alphaVSD", "alphaDBR", "alphaVSR") 
srl.pars = sapply(srl.pars, function(x) seq(0, 1, by = .25)) %>%
  `colnames<-`(srl.pars)

# Merge
rl.pars = models$fixed.par[[which(models$name %in% c("arl.fixed"))]] %>% as.data.frame() %>% 
  cbind(t(arl.pars)) %>% cbind(srl.pars)
```


```{r, expect-1alpha-compute, eval=TRUE, echo=TRUE, results='markup'}
log.txt = "social/results/expectations/log.txt"
if(!file.exists(log.txt)){file.create(log.txt)}

# Add caching
if(!file.exists(paste("social/results/expectations", "expec_1par.rds", sep = "/"))){
  
  sink(log.txt, append = T)

  # Results list
  results = list(
    rew.acc = list(),
    acc.time = list(),
    switches = list(), switches.time = list()
  )
  
  for(mod in 1:length(models$name)){

    # Get function
    f = get(models$sim[[mod]])
    
    for(parcomb in 1:nrow(rl.pars)){

      # Get rl.pars and add to sim pars
      sim.pars = c(exp.pars, env.pars, rl.pars[parcomb, ])
      
      
      # Loop over number of simulations
      for(sim in 1:nsim){
        
        if(exists("end.time")){
          print(paste("This took:", (end.time - start.time), "seconds" ))
        }
        start.time = Sys.time()
        
        prgrss = paste("Simulating from model", models$name[[mod]], 
                       ". Parameter combination", parcomb, 
                       ", simulation ", sim)
        print(prgrss)
        
        # Simulate data
        sim.data = f(sim.parameters = sim.pars)
        
        # Add sim parameters
        sim.data = sim.data %>%
          mutate(decision = decision - 1) %>%
          cbind(model=models$name[[mod]], parcomb=parcomb) %>%
          bind_cols(rl.pars[parcomb, ]) %>%
          mutate(alphaS = alphaDBD) %>%
          mutate(sim = sim) %>%
          relocate(model, parcomb, sim)
        
        # Compute mean individual accuracy and rewards
        rew.acc = sim.data %>%
          # Compute individual accuracy and rewards on each trial 
          group_by(sim, model, alphaS, session, trial, player, duration, ratio, max) %>% # for each individual trial
          reframe(acc = sum(decision), 
                  rew = sum(reward)) %>%
          mutate(acc = acc / (duration + 1)) %>%
          mutate(rew = rew / (duration + 1)) %>%
          # Compute average individual accuracy 
          group_by(sim, model, alphaS, ratio, max) %>% 
          reframe(acc.mean = mean(acc), rew.mean = mean(rew)) 
        
        # Save
        results$rew.acc = append(results$rew.acc, list(rew.acc))
        
        # Compute mean individual accuracy ~ time
        acc.time = sim.data %>%
          # Compute average individual accuracy at each time step
          group_by(sim, model, alphaS, time, ratio, max) %>%
          reframe(frac.corr = mean(decision)) 
        
        # Save
        results$acc.time = append(results$acc.time, list(acc.time))
        
        # Compute mean switch rate
        switches = sim.data %>%
          group_by(model, alphaS, sim, session, trial, player, duration, ratio, max) %>%
          mutate(switches = ifelse(lag(decision) != decision, 1, 0)) %>%
          reframe(switches = sum(switches, na.rm=T) / duration) %>%
          group_by(model, alphaS, sim, ratio, max) %>%
          reframe(switches.mean = mean(switches)) 
        
        # Save
        results$switches = append(results$switches, list(switches))
        
        # Compute mean switches ~ time
        switches.time = sim.data %>%
          group_by(model, alphaS, sim, session, trial, player, duration, ratio, max) %>%
          mutate(switch = ifelse(lag(decision) != decision, 1, 0)) %>%
          group_by(model, alphaS, sim, time, ratio, max) %>%
          reframe(switch.frac = sum(switch, na.rm = T) / max(player)) 
        
         # Save
        results$switches.time = append(results$switches.time, list(switches.time))
        
        # End time
        end.time = Sys.time()
        
      }
      
    }
  }
  
  results = lapply(results, function(x) bind_rows(x))
  saveRDS(results, file = 
            paste("social/results/expectations", "expec_1par.rds", sep = "/"))
  
  sink()
  
}else{
  results = readRDS(file = paste("social/results/expectations", "expec_1par.rds", sep = "/"))
}


```

### Plot
```{r, expect-1alpha-plot, echo=TRUE}
results$acc.time %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=time, y=frac.corr, col = model, group=interaction(model, sim))) + 
    geom_line() + 
    facet_grid(ratio ~ max)

results$switches.time %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=time, y=switch.frac, col = model, group=interaction(model, sim))) + 
    geom_line() + 
    facet_grid(ratio ~ max)
```

## Models with 2 social learning parameter (dbndbr, vsndbr, dbrvsn, vsnvsr)
```{r, expect-2alpha-rlpars, echo=TRUE}
# Get model list
models = getmodels()

# Drop versions with adaptive social learning weights
# models=lapply(models,function(x) x[!grepl(pattern = "2", models$name)] )

# Select models with single social learning parameter (and arl model)
models=lapply(models,function(x) x[models$name %in% c("dbnvsr1.fixed", "vsndbr1.fixed", "dbndbr1.fixed", "vsnvsr1.fixed")] )

# Load ARL model fit
fit = readRDS("asocial/results/modelcomp/m4.1.fit.rds")

# Get ARL parameter estimates
draws = fit %>%
  tidy_draws() %>%
  select(names(models$free.pars.pop[[which(models$name %in% c("arl.fixed"))]]))
arl.pars = apply(draws, 2, mean)

# Remove fit
remove(fit)

# Set social learning weights for decision- and reward- based DB and VS 
srl.pars = c("alphaDBD", "alphaVSD", "alphaDBR", "alphaVSR") 
srl.pars = sapply(srl.pars, function(x) seq(0, 1, by = .5)) %>%
  `colnames<-`(srl.pars)

# Merge
rl.pars = models$fixed.par[[which(models$name %in% c("arl.fixed"))]] %>% as.data.frame() %>% 
  cbind(t(arl.pars)) %>% cbind(srl.pars)
```
